---
title: "RNA-seq Analysis Report"
author: "Bioinformatics Core Facility"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    toc-expand: 2
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    self-contained: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: full
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 7
    css: css/custom.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  project_name: "RNA-seq Project"
  pi_name: "PI"
  organism: "human"
  data_dir: "prepared_data"
  de_dir: "de_results"
  enrichment_dir: "enrichment"
  qc_dir: "qc_results"
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(heatmaply)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(htmltools)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(matrixStats)

qc_results <- readRDS(file.path(params$qc_dir, "qc_results.rds"))
de_output <- readRDS(file.path(params$de_dir, "de_results.rds"))
enrichment_results <- readRDS(file.path(params$enrichment_dir, "enrichment_results.rds"))
gene_annotation <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "gene_annotation.rds"))
metadata <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "metadata.rds"))
design_info <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "design_info.rds"))

contrast_names <- names(de_output$results_shrunk)

de_colors <- c(
  "Upregulated" = "#E53935",
  "Downregulated" = "#1E88E5",
  "Not Significant" = "#BDBDBD"
)
```

# Project Overview {#sec-overview}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}

## Project Information

```{r}
#| label: project-info-table

info_df <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c(
    "Project",
    "Principal Investigator",
    "Organism",
    "Analysis Date",
    "Number of Samples",
    "Number of Conditions",
    "Conditions",
    "Reference Condition",
    "Design Formula",
    "Number of Contrasts"
  ),
  Value = c(
    params$project_name,
    params$pi_name,
    params$organism,
    as.character(Sys.Date()),
    as.character(ncol(de_output$normalized_counts)),
    as.character(design_info$n_conditions),
    paste(design_info$conditions, collapse = ", "),
    design_info$reference_level,
    deparse(design_info$design_formula),
    as.character(length(contrast_names))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(info_df, col.names = c("Parameter", "Value"))
```
:::

## Sample Metadata

```{r}
#| label: metadata-table

DT::datatable(
  metadata,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 25,
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = list(
      list(extend = "csv", filename = "sample_metadata"),
      list(extend = "excel", filename = "sample_metadata")
    ),
    scrollX = TRUE
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = "display compact stripe hover",
  caption = "Sample metadata used in this analysis"
)
```

## Differential Expression Summary

```{r}
#| label: de-summary-overview

DT::datatable(
  de_output$de_summary,
  options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 25),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = "display compact stripe",
  caption = "Summary of DE genes per contrast (padj < 0.05, |log2FC| > 1)"
) |>
  DT::formatStyle(
    "upregulated",
    color = "#E53935",
    fontWeight = "bold"
  ) |>
  DT::formatStyle(
    "downregulated",
    color = "#1E88E5",
    fontWeight = "bold"
  ) |>
  DT::formatStyle(
    "significant_total",
    background = DT::styleColorBar(
      de_output$de_summary$significant_total, "#81C784"
    ),
    backgroundSize = "100% 88%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  )
```

# Data Quality {#sec-quality}

## Library Size Distribution

```{r}
#| label: libsize-plot
#| fig-height: 5

lib_plot_data <- qc_results$lib_sizes |>
  mutate(
    hover_text = paste0(
      "<b>", sample, "</b>",
      "<br>Condition: ", condition,
      "<br>Total reads: ", format(total_counts, big.mark = ","),
      "<br>Genes detected: ", format(detected_genes, big.mark = ",")
    )
  )

p_lib <- ggplot(
  lib_plot_data,
  aes(
    x = reorder(sample, -total_counts),
    y = total_counts / 1e6,
    fill = condition,
    text = hover_text
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Library Size (millions of reads)",
    fill = "Condition",
    title = "Library Size Distribution"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")

ggplotly(p_lib, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white", font = list(size = 11)))
```

## Gene Detection Rates

```{r}
#| label: gene-detection
#| fig-height: 5

detection_long <- qc_results$lib_sizes |>
  select(sample, condition, detected_genes, detected_above_10, detected_above_100) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("detected"),
    names_to = "threshold",
    values_to = "n_genes"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    threshold = case_when(
      threshold == "detected_genes" ~ "> 0 counts",
      threshold == "detected_above_10" ~ "> 10 counts",
      threshold == "detected_above_100" ~ "> 100 counts"
    ),
    hover_text = paste0(
      "<b>", sample, "</b>",
      "<br>Threshold: ", threshold,
      "<br>Genes: ", format(n_genes, big.mark = ",")
    )
  )

p_det <- ggplot(
  detection_long,
  aes(x = sample, y = n_genes, fill = threshold, text = hover_text)
) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", width = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Genes Detected",
    fill = "Threshold",
    title = "Gene Detection by Count Threshold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")

ggplotly(p_det, tooltip = "text")
```

## Principal Component Analysis

::: {.panel-tabset}

### PC1 vs PC2

```{r}
#| label: pca-12
#| fig-height: 6

pca_plot_data <- qc_results$pca_data |>
  mutate(
    hover_text = paste0(
      "<b>", sample, "</b>",
      "<br>Condition: ", condition,
      "<br>PC1: ", round(PC1, 2),
      "<br>PC2: ", round(PC2, 2)
    )
  )

p_pca12 <- ggplot(
  pca_plot_data,
  aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = condition, text = hover_text)
) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.85) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.68, linetype = "dashed", show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%% variance)", qc_results$var_explained[1]),
    y = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%% variance)", qc_results$var_explained[2]),
    color = "Condition",
    title = "PCA: PC1 vs PC2"
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2")

ggplotly(p_pca12, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white"))
```

### PC3 vs PC4

```{r}
#| label: pca-34
#| fig-height: 6

pca_plot_data34 <- qc_results$pca_data |>
  mutate(
    hover_text = paste0(
      "<b>", sample, "</b>",
      "<br>Condition: ", condition,
      "<br>PC3: ", round(PC3, 2),
      "<br>PC4: ", round(PC4, 2)
    )
  )

p_pca34 <- ggplot(
  pca_plot_data34,
  aes(x = PC3, y = PC4, color = condition, text = hover_text)
) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = sprintf("PC3 (%.1f%% variance)", qc_results$var_explained[3]),
    y = sprintf("PC4 (%.1f%% variance)", qc_results$var_explained[4]),
    color = "Condition",
    title = "PCA: PC3 vs PC4"
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2")

ggplotly(p_pca34, tooltip = "text") |>
  layout(hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white"))
```

### Scree Plot

```{r}
#| label: scree-plot
#| fig-height: 5

n_show <- min(10, length(qc_results$var_explained))
scree_df <- data.frame(
  PC = factor(paste0("PC", seq_len(n_show)), levels = paste0("PC", seq_len(n_show))),
  Variance = qc_results$var_explained[seq_len(n_show)],
  Cumulative = cumsum(qc_results$var_explained[seq_len(n_show)])
)

p_scree <- ggplot(scree_df, aes(x = PC, y = Variance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#5C6BC0", width = 0.6) +
  geom_line(aes(group = 1, y = Cumulative), color = "#E53935", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = Cumulative), color = "#E53935", size = 3) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Principal Component",
    y = "Variance Explained (%)",
    title = "Scree Plot"
  )

ggplotly(p_scree)
```
:::

## Sample Correlation Matrix

```{r}
#| label: correlation-heatmap
#| fig-height: 8

heatmaply(
  qc_results$cor_matrix,
  main = "Sample Correlation (Pearson) on VST-Transformed Counts",
  colors = colorRampPalette(c("#3949AB", "white", "#E53935"))(256),
  cellnote = round(qc_results$cor_matrix, 3),
  fontsize_row = 9,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  margins = c(80, 80, 60, 20)
)
```

## Sample Distance Heatmap

```{r}
#| label: distance-heatmap
#| fig-height: 8

heatmaply(
  qc_results$dist_matrix,
  main = "Sample Distance (Euclidean) on VST-Transformed Counts",
  colors = viridis(256),
  fontsize_row = 9,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  margins = c(80, 80, 60, 20)
)
```

## Top 50 Most Variable Genes

```{r}
#| label: topvar-heatmap
#| fig-height: 10

top_var_scaled <- t(scale(t(qc_results$top_var_matrix)))

annotation_df <- data.frame(
  Condition = metadata$condition,
  row.names = metadata$sample_id
)

heatmaply(
  top_var_scaled,
  main = "Top 50 Most Variable Genes (Z-score Scaled)",
  col_side_colors = annotation_df,
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  showticklabels = c(TRUE, TRUE),
  margins = c(80, 120, 60, 20)
)
```

# Differential Expression {#sec-de}

```{r}
#| label: de-sections
#| results: asis
#| fig-height: 8

for (idx in seq_along(contrast_names)) {

  cname <- contrast_names[idx]
  cname_display <- gsub("_", " ", cname)
  res_df <- de_output$results_shrunk[[cname]]
  gpmap <- enrichment_results[[cname]][["gene_pathway_map"]]

  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {#sec-de-%d}\n\n", cname_display, idx))

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # Volcano Plot
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  cat("\n\n### Volcano Plot\n\n")

  volcano_data <- res_df |>
    filter(!is.na(padj), !is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
    mutate(
      neg_log10_padj = -log10(pmax(padj, 1e-300)),
      significant = case_when(
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 1 ~ "Upregulated",
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -1 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      ),
      significant = factor(
        significant,
        levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated", "Not Significant")
      )
    )

  if (!is.null(gpmap) && nrow(gpmap) > 0) {
    pw_summary <- gpmap |>
      group_by(symbol) |>
      summarise(
        pathways_hover = paste(head(unique(pathway), 5), collapse = "\n"),
        n_pathways = n_distinct(pathway),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    volcano_data <- volcano_data |>
      left_join(pw_summary, by = "symbol") |>
      mutate(
        pathways_hover = ifelse(is.na(pathways_hover), "None annotated", pathways_hover),
        n_pathways = ifelse(is.na(n_pathways), 0L, n_pathways)
      )
  } else {
    volcano_data$pathways_hover <- "None annotated"
    volcano_data$n_pathways <- 0L
  }

  volcano_data <- volcano_data |>
    mutate(
      hover_text = paste0(
        "<b>", symbol, "</b>",
        ifelse(!is.na(GENENAME), paste0("<br><i>", GENENAME, "</i>"), ""),
        "<br><br>log2FC: ", round(log2FoldChange, 3),
        "<br>adj.P: ", signif(padj, 3),
        "<br>baseMean: ", round(baseMean, 1),
        "<br><br><b>Pathways (", n_pathways, "):</b><br>",
        pathways_hover
      )
    )

  n_up <- sum(volcano_data$significant == "Upregulated")
  n_down <- sum(volcano_data$significant == "Downregulated")

  top_label_genes <- volcano_data |>
    filter(significant != "Not Significant") |>
    arrange(padj) |>
    head(20)

  xrange_v <- range(volcano_data$log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE)
  ymax_v <- max(volcano_data$neg_log10_padj, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05

  fig_volcano <- plot_ly() |>
    add_trace(
      data = filter(volcano_data, significant == "Not Significant"),
      x = ~log2FoldChange, y = ~neg_log10_padj,
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      marker = list(color = "#BDBDBD", size = 3, opacity = 0.3),
      text = ~hover_text, hoverinfo = "text",
      name = "Not Significant"
    ) |>
    add_trace(
      data = filter(volcano_data, significant == "Upregulated"),
      x = ~log2FoldChange, y = ~neg_log10_padj,
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      marker = list(
        color = "#E53935", size = 5, opacity = 0.7,
        line = list(color = "#B71C1C", width = 0.5)
      ),
      text = ~hover_text, hoverinfo = "text",
      name = paste0("Up (", n_up, ")")
    ) |>
    add_trace(
      data = filter(volcano_data, significant == "Downregulated"),
      x = ~log2FoldChange, y = ~neg_log10_padj,
      type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      marker = list(
        color = "#1E88E5", size = 5, opacity = 0.7,
        line = list(color = "#0D47A1", width = 0.5)
      ),
      text = ~hover_text, hoverinfo = "text",
      name = paste0("Down (", n_down, ")")
    ) |>
    layout(
      title = list(
        text = paste("Volcano Plot:", cname_display),
        font = list(size = 15)
      ),
      xaxis = list(
        title = "log\u2082 Fold Change",
        zeroline = TRUE,
        zerolinecolor = "#E0E0E0"
      ),
      yaxis = list(title = "-log\u2081\u2080(adjusted p-value)"),
      shapes = list(
        list(
          type = "line",
          x0 = xrange_v[1], x1 = xrange_v[2],
          y0 = -log10(0.05), y1 = -log10(0.05),
          line = list(color = "#9E9E9E", width = 1, dash = "dash")
        ),
        list(
          type = "line",
          x0 = -1, x1 = -1, y0 = 0, y1 = ymax_v,
          line = list(color = "#9E9E9E", width = 1, dash = "dash")
        ),
        list(
          type = "line",
          x0 = 1, x1 = 1, y0 = 0, y1 = ymax_v,
          line = list(color = "#9E9E9E", width = 1, dash = "dash")
        )
      ),
      legend = list(x = 0.01, y = 0.99, bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.85)"),
      hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white", font = list(size = 11))
    ) |>
    config(
      toImageButtonOptions = list(
        format = "svg",
        filename = paste0("volcano_", cname),
        width = 1200,
        height = 800
      )
    )

  if (nrow(top_label_genes) > 0) {
    fig_volcano <- fig_volcano |>
      add_annotations(
        data = top_label_genes,
        x = ~log2FoldChange, y = ~neg_log10_padj,
        text = ~symbol,
        xref = "x", yref = "y",
        showarrow = TRUE, arrowhead = 0, arrowsize = 0.5,
        ax = 25, ay = -20,
        font = list(size = 8, color = "#212121")
      )
  }

  print(htmltools::tagList(fig_volcano))

  cat("\n\n")

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # MA Plot
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  cat("\n\n### MA Plot\n\n")

  ma_data <- res_df |>
    filter(!is.na(padj), !is.na(log2FoldChange), !is.na(baseMean)) |>
    mutate(
      log10_basemean = log10(baseMean + 1),
      sig_label = case_when(
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 1 ~ "Upregulated",
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -1 ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      ),
      hover_text = paste0(
        "<b>", symbol, "</b>",
        "<br>baseMean: ", round(baseMean, 1),
        "<br>log2FC: ", round(log2FoldChange, 3),
        "<br>adj.P: ", signif(padj, 3)
      )
    )

  p_ma <- ggplot(
    ma_data,
    aes(x = log10_basemean, y = log2FoldChange, color = sig_label, text = hover_text)
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = de_colors, name = "") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#757575") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dotted", color = "#BDBDBD") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      x = "log\u2081\u2080(Mean Expression + 1)",
      y = "log\u2082 Fold Change",
      title = paste("MA Plot:", cname_display)
    )

  print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_ma, tooltip = "text")))

  cat("\n\n")

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # Top DE Genes Heatmap
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  cat("\n\n### Top DE Genes Heatmap\n\n")

  top_de <- res_df |>
    filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
    arrange(padj) |>
    head(50)

  if (nrow(top_de) > 0) {
    ens_ids_present <- intersect(top_de$ensembl_id, rownames(de_output$normalized_counts))
    if (length(ens_ids_present) > 2) {
      hm_matrix <- de_output$normalized_counts[ens_ids_present, , drop = FALSE]
      sym_lookup <- setNames(top_de$symbol, top_de$ensembl_id)
      mapped_rownames <- sym_lookup[rownames(hm_matrix)]
      rownames(hm_matrix) <- ifelse(
        is.na(mapped_rownames), rownames(hm_matrix), mapped_rownames
      )
      hm_scaled <- t(scale(t(log2(hm_matrix + 1))))
      hm_annot <- data.frame(
        Condition = metadata$condition,
        row.names = metadata$sample_id
      )

      hm_fig <- heatmaply(
        hm_scaled,
        main = paste("Top 50 DE Genes:", cname_display),
        col_side_colors = hm_annot,
        fontsize_row = 7,
        fontsize_col = 9,
        showticklabels = c(TRUE, TRUE),
        margins = c(80, 120, 60, 20)
      )
      print(htmltools::tagList(hm_fig))
    }
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # DE Gene Table
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  cat("\n\n### Gene Table\n\n")

  de_table_data <- res_df |>
    filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
    select(symbol, ensembl_id, log2FoldChange, padj, baseMean, GENENAME) |>
    mutate(
      log2FoldChange = round(log2FoldChange, 3),
      padj = signif(padj, 3),
      baseMean = round(baseMean, 1)
    ) |>
    arrange(padj)

  dt_de <- DT::datatable(
    de_table_data,
    filter = "top",
    extensions = c("Buttons", "Scroller"),
    options = list(
      pageLength = 15,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = list(
        list(extend = "csv", filename = paste0("DE_", cname)),
        list(extend = "excel", filename = paste0("DE_", cname))
      ),
      scrollX = TRUE,
      scrollY = "500px",
      scroller = TRUE
    ),
    rownames = FALSE,
    class = "display compact hover stripe",
    caption = paste("Differential expression results:", cname_display)
  ) |>
    DT::formatStyle(
      "log2FoldChange",
      color = DT::styleInterval(c(-1, 1), c("#1E88E5", "#424242", "#E53935"))
    ) |>
    DT::formatStyle(
      "padj",
      backgroundColor = DT::styleInterval(
        c(0.01, 0.05),
        c("#FFCDD2", "#FFF9C4", "white")
      )
    )

  print(htmltools::tagList(dt_de))

  cat("\n\n")

}
```

# Pathway Analysis {#sec-pathways}

```{r}
#| label: enrichment-sections
#| results: asis
#| fig-height: 9

for (idx in seq_along(contrast_names)) {

  cname <- contrast_names[idx]
  cname_display <- gsub("_", " ", cname)
  enrich <- enrichment_results[[cname]]

  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {#sec-pw-%d}\n\n", cname_display, idx))

  # ====================================================
  # GO Biological Process
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### GO: Biological Process\n\n")

  go_bp_df <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(enrich[["GO_BP"]]), error = function(e) NULL)

  if (!is.null(go_bp_df) && nrow(go_bp_df) > 0) {
    go_bp_plot <- go_bp_df |>
      head(20) |>
      mutate(
        neg_log10_padj = -log10(p.adjust),
        Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description)),
        hover_text = paste0(
          "<b>", Description, "</b>",
          "<br>ID: ", ID,
          "<br>p.adjust: ", signif(p.adjust, 3),
          "<br>Gene Ratio: ", GeneRatio,
          "<br>Count: ", Count,
          "<br><br>Genes: ",
          ifelse(nchar(geneID) > 300, paste0(substr(geneID, 1, 300), "..."), geneID)
        )
      )

    p_gobp <- ggplot(
      go_bp_plot,
      aes(x = neg_log10_padj, y = Description, fill = Count, text = hover_text)
    ) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#C8E6C9", high = "#1B5E20") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
      labs(
        x = "-log\u2081\u2080(adjusted p-value)",
        y = "",
        title = "GO: Biological Process",
        fill = "Count"
      )

    print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_gobp, tooltip = "text")))
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO:BP terms found for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ====================================================
  # GO Molecular Function
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### GO: Molecular Function\n\n")

  go_mf_df <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(enrich[["GO_MF"]]), error = function(e) NULL)

  if (!is.null(go_mf_df) && nrow(go_mf_df) > 0) {
    go_mf_plot <- go_mf_df |>
      head(20) |>
      mutate(
        neg_log10_padj = -log10(p.adjust),
        Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description)),
        hover_text = paste0(
          "<b>", Description, "</b>",
          "<br>p.adjust: ", signif(p.adjust, 3),
          "<br>Gene Ratio: ", GeneRatio,
          "<br>Count: ", Count
        )
      )

    p_gomf <- ggplot(
      go_mf_plot,
      aes(x = neg_log10_padj, y = Description, fill = Count, text = hover_text)
    ) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#BBDEFB", high = "#0D47A1") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
      labs(
        x = "-log\u2081\u2080(adjusted p-value)",
        y = "",
        title = "GO: Molecular Function",
        fill = "Count"
      )

    print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_gomf, tooltip = "text")))
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO:MF terms found for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ====================================================
  # GO Cellular Component
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### GO: Cellular Component\n\n")

  go_cc_df <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(enrich[["GO_CC"]]), error = function(e) NULL)

  if (!is.null(go_cc_df) && nrow(go_cc_df) > 0) {
    go_cc_plot <- go_cc_df |>
      head(20) |>
      mutate(
        neg_log10_padj = -log10(p.adjust),
        Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description)),
        hover_text = paste0(
          "<b>", Description, "</b>",
          "<br>p.adjust: ", signif(p.adjust, 3),
          "<br>Gene Ratio: ", GeneRatio,
          "<br>Count: ", Count
        )
      )

    p_gocc <- ggplot(
      go_cc_plot,
      aes(x = neg_log10_padj, y = Description, fill = Count, text = hover_text)
    ) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#FFF9C4", high = "#F57F17") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
      labs(
        x = "-log\u2081\u2080(adjusted p-value)",
        y = "",
        title = "GO: Cellular Component",
        fill = "Count"
      )

    print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_gocc, tooltip = "text")))
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO:CC terms found for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ====================================================
  # KEGG Pathways
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### KEGG Pathways\n\n")

  kegg_df <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(enrich[["KEGG"]]), error = function(e) NULL)

  if (!is.null(kegg_df) && nrow(kegg_df) > 0) {
    kegg_plot <- kegg_df |>
      head(20) |>
      mutate(
        neg_log10_padj = -log10(p.adjust),
        Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description)),
        hover_text = paste0(
          "<b>", Description, "</b>",
          "<br>ID: ", ID,
          "<br>p.adjust: ", signif(p.adjust, 3),
          "<br>Gene Ratio: ", GeneRatio,
          "<br>Count: ", Count,
          "<br><br>Genes: ",
          ifelse(nchar(geneID) > 300, paste0(substr(geneID, 1, 300), "..."), geneID)
        )
      )

    p_kegg <- ggplot(
      kegg_plot,
      aes(x = neg_log10_padj, y = Description, fill = Count, text = hover_text)
    ) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#FFE0B2", high = "#E65100") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
      labs(
        x = "-log\u2081\u2080(adjusted p-value)",
        y = "",
        title = "KEGG Pathways",
        fill = "Count"
      )

    print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_kegg, tooltip = "text")))
  } else {
    cat("No significant KEGG pathways found for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ====================================================
  # Reactome Pathways
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### Reactome Pathways\n\n")

  react_df <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(enrich[["Reactome"]]), error = function(e) NULL)

  if (!is.null(react_df) && nrow(react_df) > 0) {
    react_plot <- react_df |>
      head(20) |>
      mutate(
        neg_log10_padj = -log10(p.adjust),
        Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(Description)),
        hover_text = paste0(
          "<b>", Description, "</b>",
          "<br>p.adjust: ", signif(p.adjust, 3),
          "<br>Gene Ratio: ", GeneRatio,
          "<br>Count: ", Count,
          "<br><br>Genes: ",
          ifelse(nchar(geneID) > 300, paste0(substr(geneID, 1, 300), "..."), geneID)
        )
      )

    p_react <- ggplot(
      react_plot,
      aes(x = neg_log10_padj, y = Description, fill = Count, text = hover_text)
    ) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#E1BEE7", high = "#4A148C") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
      labs(
        x = "-log\u2081\u2080(adjusted p-value)",
        y = "",
        title = "Reactome Pathways",
        fill = "Count"
      )

    print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_react, tooltip = "text")))
  } else {
    cat("No significant Reactome pathways found for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ====================================================
  # GSEA Hallmark
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### GSEA: MSigDB Hallmark\n\n")

  hallmark_res <- enrich[["GSEA_Hallmark"]]

  if (!is.null(hallmark_res) && nrow(hallmark_res) > 0) {
    hallmark_plot <- hallmark_res |>
      filter(padj < 0.25) |>
      arrange(NES) |>
      mutate(
        pathway_clean = factor(pathway_clean, levels = pathway_clean),
        direction = ifelse(NES > 0, "Activated", "Suppressed"),
        hover_text = paste0(
          "<b>", pathway_clean, "</b>",
          "<br>NES: ", round(NES, 3),
          "<br>p.adjust: ", signif(padj, 3),
          "<br>Gene set size: ", size
        )
      )

    if (nrow(hallmark_plot) > 0) {
      p_hall <- ggplot(
        hallmark_plot,
        aes(x = NES, y = pathway_clean, fill = direction, text = hover_text)
      ) +
        geom_col() +
        scale_fill_manual(values = c("Activated" = "#E53935", "Suppressed" = "#1E88E5")) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "#424242", linewidth = 0.5) +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
        theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
        labs(
          x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
          y = "",
          title = "GSEA: Hallmark Gene Sets",
          fill = "Direction"
        )

      print(htmltools::tagList(ggplotly(p_hall, tooltip = "text")))
    } else {
      cat("No Hallmark gene sets passed padj < 0.25 threshold.\n\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("No Hallmark GSEA results available for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ====================================================
  # Combined Enrichment Table
  # ====================================================
  cat("\n\n### Enrichment Results Table\n\n")

  combined_enrich <- bind_rows(
    if (!is.null(go_bp_df) && nrow(go_bp_df) > 0) {
      go_bp_df |> mutate(Database = "GO:BP")
    },
    if (!is.null(go_mf_df) && nrow(go_mf_df) > 0) {
      go_mf_df |> mutate(Database = "GO:MF")
    },
    if (!is.null(go_cc_df) && nrow(go_cc_df) > 0) {
      go_cc_df |> mutate(Database = "GO:CC")
    },
    if (!is.null(kegg_df) && nrow(kegg_df) > 0) {
      kegg_df |> mutate(Database = "KEGG")
    },
    if (!is.null(react_df) && nrow(react_df) > 0) {
      react_df |> mutate(Database = "Reactome")
    }
  )

  if (!is.null(combined_enrich) && nrow(combined_enrich) > 0) {
    enrich_table <- combined_enrich |>
      select(Database, ID, Description, GeneRatio, p.adjust, Count, geneID) |>
      mutate(p.adjust = signif(p.adjust, 3))

    dt_enrich <- DT::datatable(
      enrich_table,
      filter = "top",
      extensions = c("Buttons", "Scroller"),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 15,
        dom = "Bfrtip",
        buttons = list(
          list(extend = "csv", filename = paste0("enrichment_", cname)),
          list(extend = "excel", filename = paste0("enrichment_", cname))
        ),
        scrollX = TRUE,
        scrollY = "500px",
        scroller = TRUE
      ),
      rownames = FALSE,
      class = "display compact hover",
      caption = paste("All enrichment results:", cname_display)
    ) |>
      DT::formatStyle(
        "p.adjust",
        backgroundColor = DT::styleInterval(
          c(0.001, 0.01, 0.05),
          c("#EF9A9A", "#FFCDD2", "#FFF9C4", "white")
        )
      )

    print(htmltools::tagList(dt_enrich))
  } else {
    cat("No significant enrichment results found for this contrast.\n\n")
  }

  cat("\n\n")
}
```

# Gene Explorer {#sec-explorer}

::: {.callout-tip}
## How to use this section
Search for any gene in the table below using the search box
Sort by any column by clicking column headers
Filter using the filter boxes at the top of each column
Download results using the CSV or Excel buttons
Scroll down to see expression boxplots for the top DE genes
:::

## Searchable Gene Table

```{r}
#| label: gene-explorer-table

gene_table_data <- de_output$results_shrunk[[1]] |>
  filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
  select(symbol, ensembl_id, log2FoldChange, padj, baseMean, GENENAME) |>
  mutate(
    log2FoldChange = round(log2FoldChange, 3),
    padj = signif(padj, 3),
    baseMean = round(baseMean, 1)
  ) |>
  arrange(padj)

DT::datatable(
  gene_table_data,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = c("Buttons", "Scroller"),
  options = list(
    pageLength = 20,
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = list(
      list(extend = "csv", filename = "all_genes"),
      list(extend = "excel", filename = "all_genes")
    ),
    scrollX = TRUE,
    scrollY = "500px",
    scroller = TRUE,
    search = list(regex = TRUE, caseInsensitive = TRUE)
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  class = "display compact hover stripe",
  caption = paste(
    "All tested genes from first contrast:",
    gsub("_", " ", contrast_names[1])
  )
) |>
  DT::formatStyle(
    "log2FoldChange",
    color = DT::styleInterval(c(-1, 1), c("#1E88E5", "#424242", "#E53935"))
  ) |>
  DT::formatStyle(
    "padj",
    backgroundColor = DT::styleInterval(
      c(0.01, 0.05),
      c("#FFCDD2", "#FFF9C4", "white")
    )
  )
```

## Top Gene Expression Profiles

Expression boxplots for the top differentially expressed genes, showing normalized counts across all conditions.

```{r}
#| label: gene-boxplots
#| results: asis
#| fig-height: 4

top_genes_for_boxplot <- de_output$results_shrunk[[1]] |>
  filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
  arrange(padj) |>
  head(12)

if (nrow(top_genes_for_boxplot) > 0) {
  gene_ids <- top_genes_for_boxplot$ensembl_id
  valid_genes <- intersect(gene_ids, rownames(de_output$normalized_counts))
  
  if (length(valid_genes) > 0) {
    counts_sub <- de_output$normalized_counts[valid_genes, , drop = FALSE]
    
    counts_long <- as.data.frame(counts_sub) |>
      tibble::rownames_to_column("ensembl_id") |>
      tidyr::pivot_longer(-ensembl_id, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "count") |>
      left_join(metadata, by = "sample_id") |>
      left_join(select(top_genes_for_boxplot, ensembl_id, symbol), by = "ensembl_id")
      
    for (gid in valid_genes) {
      gene_data <- counts_long |> filter(ensembl_id == gid)
      gene_sym <- unique(gene_data$symbol)
      
      p <- ggplot(gene_data, aes(x = condition, y = count, fill = condition)) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
        geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
        theme_minimal() +
        labs(title = paste0(gene_sym, " (", gid, ")"), y = "Normalized Counts", x = "") +
        theme(legend.position = "none")
        
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n")
    }
  }
}
```
